name: TEN Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview TEN Holdings, Inc. (the Company, TEN Holdings, we, us, or our), headquartered in Langhorne, Pennsylvania, was incorporated on February 12, 2024 in Pennsylvania to act as the holding company of TEN Events, Inc. (TEN Events), which was incorporated in Pennsylvania in May of 2011 and is an operating entity. TEN Events is a provider of event planning, production, and broadcasting services. TEN Events produces virtual, hybrid, self-service, and physical events. Virtual, hybrid, and ...
